items.title: scikit-learn supervised learning guide
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Official overview separating regression and classification estimators, losses, and metrics.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani, Jerome Friedman
items.note: Chapters on linear methods for regression and classification, including logistic regression framing.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Probabilistic treatment of regression and classification as distinct predictive tasks with shared foundations.
